expectations.text: Flags the response payload rename as a Principle I (API v1 contract) violation
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 details all four renames/removals as a Principle I violation.

expectations.text: Flags the console.log of session_id or password as a Principle V (secrets) violation
expectations.evidence: Finding 2 quotes both console.log lines and cites Principle V.

expectations.text: Notes the hardcoded admin@nutri.test bypass in models/user.js as a Principle II concern
expectations.evidence: Finding 3 cites the admin@nutri.test bypass under Principle II (and IV).

expectations.text: Notes missing integration test coverage as a Principle III concern
expectations.evidence: Finding 4 explicitly flags missing tests under Principle III.

expectations.text: Returns final verdict PR-ready: no (or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Top of file: 'Verdict: BLOCK — not ready to merge.' Semantically equivalent to PR-ready: no.
